gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST to source gNB-DU to stop data transmission to UE and source gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status frame to gNB-CU.
Source gNB-DU responds with UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION RESPONSE to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends SGNB MODIFICATION REQUIRED message to MeNB.
MeNB initiates SGNB MODIFICATION REQUEST procedure and exchanges SGNB MODIFICATION REQUEST and ACKNOWLEDGE messages with gNB-CU as needed.
MeNB and UE perform RRC Connection Reconfiguration procedure.
MeNB sends SGNB MODIFICATION CONFIRM message to gNB-CU.
Random Access procedure is performed at target gNB-DU.
Target gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status frame to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU forwards downlink packets including any PDCP PDUs not successfully transmitted from source gNB-DU to target gNB-DU.
Target gNB-DU sends downlink packets to UE; UE sends uplink packets forwarded to gNB-CU via target gNB-DU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND to source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context and responds with UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE to gNB-CU.
expected_results: ULInformationTransferMRDC message is successfully received by MeNB.
RRC TRANSFER message is correctly forwarded to gNB-CU.
Source gNB-DU responds with accurate and complete UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION RESPONSE.
Target gNB-DU successfully creates UE context and data bearers upon UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST and responds with UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE.
Source gNB-DU stops data transmission and sends Downlink Data Delivery Status frame to gNB-CU.
SGNB MODIFICATION REQUIRED and subsequent modification procedures are correctly executed between gNB-CU and MeNB.
RRC Connection Reconfiguration between MeNB and UE completes successfully.
Random Access procedure at target gNB-DU completes successfully.
Downlink and uplink data flows are correctly switched to target gNB-DU without data loss.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context upon receiving UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND and confirms with UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE.
No signaling or data transmission errors occur during the entire mobility procedure.

title: Verify UE Context Setup Request and Response during Inter-gNB-DU Mobility
objective: Validate that the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST and UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE messages are correctly exchanged between gNB-CU and target gNB-DU with proper CG ConfigInfo during inter-gNB-DU mobility.
preconditions: gNB-CU has received full UE context information from source gNB-DU.
Target gNB-DU is reachable and ready to setup UE context.
steps: gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to target gNB-DU including CG ConfigInfo.
Target gNB-DU processes the request and creates UE context and data bearers accordingly.
Target gNB-DU sends UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message back to gNB-CU.
expected_results: UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST contains valid CG ConfigInfo and all necessary parameters.
Target gNB-DU successfully creates UE context and data bearers as per the request.
UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE is sent without errors and confirms successful setup.

title: Verify UE Context Release Procedure at Source gNB-DU after Mobility
objective: Ensure that the source gNB-DU correctly releases the UE context after mobility and confirms release to gNB-CU.
preconditions: UE context has been successfully setup at target gNB-DU.
Data transmission has been switched to target gNB-DU.
steps: gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND message to source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases the UE context associated with the UE.
Source gNB-DU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE message to gNB-CU.
expected_results: UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND is received and processed by source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases all UE related resources and contexts.
UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE message is sent to gNB-CU confirming release.

title: Validate Downlink Data Delivery Status Handling during Inter-gNB-DU Mobility
objective: Verify that Downlink Data Delivery Status frames are correctly exchanged between source gNB-DU, target gNB-DU, and gNB-CU to handle unsuccessfully transmitted downlink data during mobility.
preconditions: UE is undergoing inter-gNB-DU mobility within the same gNB-CU.
Downlink data transmission is active.
steps: Source gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status frame to gNB-CU indicating unsuccessfully transmitted downlink data.
Target gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status frame to gNB-CU after Random Access procedure.
gNB-CU forwards downlink packets including any lost PDCP PDUs to target gNB-DU.
expected_results: Downlink Data Delivery Status frames are correctly received and processed by gNB-CU.
gNB-CU successfully forwards lost downlink data to target gNB-DU.
Target gNB-DU delivers downlink data to UE without loss.
No data loss or duplication occurs during the data forwarding process.

title: Verify RRC Connection Reconfiguration between MeNB and UE during Inter-gNB-DU Mobility
objective: Ensure that the RRC Connection Reconfiguration procedure between MeNB and UE is correctly performed as part of the inter-gNB-DU mobility process.
preconditions: SGNB MODIFICATION REQUIRED message has been sent from gNB-CU to MeNB.
MeNB and UE are connected and capable of RRC signaling.
steps: MeNB initiates RRC Connection Reconfiguration procedure with UE.
UE processes and applies the RRC Reconfiguration.
MeNB sends SGNB MODIFICATION CONFIRM message to gNB-CU upon successful reconfiguration.
expected_results: RRC Connection Reconfiguration messages are correctly exchanged between MeNB and UE.
UE successfully applies the new configuration.
SGNB MODIFICATION CONFIRM is sent to gNB-CU confirming successful reconfiguration.

title: MN Initiated Conditional PSCell Addition - Successful Procedure
objective: Verify the successful execution of MN initiated Conditional PSCell Addition procedure including SN Addition Request, RRC reconfiguration, Random Access, and Bearer Context Setup.
preconditions: UE is connected to MN (Master Node)
MN and SN (Secondary Node) are configured and reachable
F1AP interface between SN-CU and SN-DU is established
AMF and UPF are operational and reachable
steps: MN sends SN Addition Request to SN-CU-CP
SN-CU-CP acknowledges SN Addition Request
MN sends RRC Reconfiguration message to UE containing MN RRC Reconfiguration and SN RRC Reconfiguration
UE processes RRC Reconfiguration and sends RRC Reconfiguration Complete message
SN sends SN Reconfiguration Complete to MN
MN initiates Random Access procedure at target SN gNB-DU
Target SN gNB-DU performs Path Update procedure
SN-CU-UP initiates Bearer Context Setup Request to SN-DU
SN-DU responds with Bearer Context Setup Response
SN-CU-UP sends Bearer Context Modification Request and receives Bearer Context Modification Response
Target SN gNB-DU sends ACCESS SUCCESS message to SN-CU-CP indicating successful UE access
Target SN gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status to SN-CU-UP
MN sends PDU Session Modification Indication and receives PDU Session Modification Confirmation
MN sends SN Status Transfer and Data Forwarding messages as applicable
MN sends End Marker Packet to complete the procedure
expected_results: SN Addition Request is acknowledged by SN-CU-CP
UE successfully applies RRC Reconfiguration and responds with RRC Reconfiguration Complete
Random Access procedure at SN gNB-DU completes successfully
Bearer Context Setup and Modification procedures complete successfully with proper responses
ACCESS SUCCESS message is received by SN-CU-CP indicating UE access to SN cell
Downlink Data Delivery Status is received by SN-CU-UP
PDU Session Modification Indication and Confirmation are exchanged successfully
SN Status Transfer and Data Forwarding are performed correctly
End Marker Packet is sent to finalize the procedure

title: MN Initiated Conditional PSCell Addition - RRC Reconfiguration Failure
objective: Verify system behavior when UE fails to complete RRC Reconfiguration during MN initiated Conditional PSCell Addition.
preconditions: UE is connected to MN
MN and SN are configured and reachable
F1AP interface between SN-CU and SN-DU is established
steps: MN sends SN Addition Request to SN-CU-CP
SN-CU-CP acknowledges SN Addition Request
MN sends RRC Reconfiguration message to UE containing MN and SN RRC Reconfiguration
UE fails to apply RRC Reconfiguration and does not send RRC Reconfiguration Complete
MN waits for RRC Reconfiguration Complete timeout
MN initiates error handling or aborts Conditional PSCell Addition procedure
expected_results: SN Addition Request is acknowledged by SN-CU-CP
UE does not send RRC Reconfiguration Complete within expected time
MN detects timeout and triggers error handling or aborts procedure
No Bearer Context Setup or Random Access procedure is initiated at SN
System logs appropriate error for RRC Reconfiguration failure

title: MN Initiated Conditional PSCell Addition - Random Access Failure at SN gNB-DU
objective: Verify system behavior when Random Access procedure fails at target SN gNB-DU during MN initiated Conditional PSCell Addition.
preconditions: UE is connected to MN
MN and SN are configured and reachable
RRC Reconfiguration Complete message is successfully received from UE
steps: MN sends SN Addition Request and receives acknowledgement
MN sends RRC Reconfiguration message and receives RRC Reconfiguration Complete from UE
MN initiates Random Access procedure at target SN gNB-DU
Random Access procedure fails or times out at SN gNB-DU
MN detects Random Access failure
MN initiates error handling or aborts Conditional PSCell Addition procedure
expected_results: SN Addition Request and RRC Reconfiguration steps complete successfully
Random Access procedure failure is detected by MN
No Bearer Context Setup or further SN procedures are performed
System logs Random Access failure event
MN aborts Conditional PSCell Addition procedure or triggers recovery

title: MN Initiated Conditional PSCell Addition - Bearer Context Setup Failure
objective: Verify system behavior when Bearer Context Setup fails during MN initiated Conditional PSCell Addition.
preconditions: UE is connected to MN
Random Access procedure at SN gNB-DU completed successfully
SN-CU-UP and SN-DU F1 interface is established
steps: MN sends SN Addition Request and receives acknowledgement
MN sends RRC Reconfiguration and receives RRC Reconfiguration Complete
Random Access procedure at SN gNB-DU completes successfully
SN-CU-UP sends Bearer Context Setup Request to SN-DU
SN-DU fails to respond or sends Bearer Context Setup Failure
MN detects Bearer Context Setup failure
MN initiates error handling or aborts Conditional PSCell Addition procedure
expected_results: Bearer Context Setup Request is sent by SN-CU-UP
Bearer Context Setup Response is not received or indicates failure
MN detects Bearer Context Setup failure
MN aborts Conditional PSCell Addition or triggers recovery procedures
System logs Bearer Context Setup failure

title: MN Initiated Conditional PSCell Addition - Verification of Downlink Data Delivery Status and ACCESS SUCCESS
objective: Verify that after successful Random Access and Bearer Context Setup, the target SN gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status and ACCESS SUCCESS messages correctly.
preconditions: UE is connected to MN
Random Access procedure at SN gNB-DU completed successfully
Bearer Context Setup and Modification procedures completed successfully
steps: MN sends SN Addition Request and receives acknowledgement
MN sends RRC Reconfiguration and receives RRC Reconfiguration Complete
Random Access procedure at SN gNB-DU completes successfully
SN-CU-UP and SN-DU complete Bearer Context Setup and Modification
Target SN gNB-DU sends Downlink Data Delivery Status to SN-CU-UP

title: Centralized Retransmission on Radio Link Outage in Intra gNB-CU Scenario
objective: Verify that gNB-CU correctly switches data traffic and retransmission from an affected gNB-DU to another available gNB-DU upon radio link outage notification.
preconditions: UE is connected to gNB-CU at RRC and PDCP levels.
UE has active DRBs configured on at least two gNB-DUs (gNB-DU1 and gNB-DU2).
Normal data transmission is ongoing via gNB-DU1 and gNB-DU2.
steps: Simulate radio link outage on gNB-DU1 towards the UE (e.g., blocking fast fading).
gNB-DU1 detects the radio link outage and sends a 'Radio Link Outage' notification message as part of the DDDS PDU over the F1-U interface to gNB-CU, including PDCP sequence number information.
Verify that gNB-CU processes the outage notification and decides to switch data traffic and retransmission from gNB-DU1 to gNB-DU2.
Verify that gNB-CU stops sending downlink traffic to gNB-DU1 but does not remove gNB-DU1's DRBs.
Verify that gNB-CU starts sending new and retransmitted PDCP PDUs to gNB-DU2.
expected_results: gNB-CU receives and correctly interprets the 'Radio Link Outage' notification from gNB-DU1.
gNB-CU switches data traffic transmission and retransmission of undelivered PDCP PDUs from gNB-DU1 to gNB-DU2.
Downlink traffic to gNB-DU1 is stopped but DRBs on gNB-DU1 remain configured.
gNB-DU2 receives new and retransmitted PDCP PDUs and forwards them to the UE.
UE continues to receive data without interruption via gNB-DU2.

title: Centralized Retransmission on Radio Link Resume in Intra gNB-CU Scenario
objective: Verify that gNB-CU resumes data traffic transmission via the previously affected gNB-DU when the radio link is restored.
preconditions: Centralized retransmission mechanism is active with data traffic currently switched to gNB-DU2 due to gNB-DU1 radio link outage.
gNB-DU1 DRBs remain configured but no downlink traffic is sent to gNB-DU1.
steps: Simulate restoration of the radio link on gNB-DU1 towards the UE.
gNB-DU1 sends a 'Radio Link Resume' notification message as part of the DDDS PDU over the F1-U interface to gNB-CU.
Verify that gNB-CU processes the resume notification and resumes sending new and retransmitted PDCP PDUs via gNB-DU1.
Verify that data traffic transmission via gNB-DU2 continues or is adjusted as per gNB-CU decision.
expected_results: gNB-CU receives and correctly interprets the 'Radio Link Resume' notification from gNB-DU1.
gNB-CU resumes data traffic transmission and retransmission of PDCP PDUs via gNB-DU1.
UE receives data via gNB-DU1 again without data loss or duplication.
Data transmission via gNB-DU2 is maintained or adjusted according to gNB-CU's traffic management.

title: Handling Lost F1-U Sequence Numbers in Centralized Retransmission
objective: Verify that gNB-CU correctly handles lost F1-U sequence numbers reported by gNB-DU during radio link outage and performs appropriate retransmissions.
preconditions: UE connected with active DRBs on multiple gNB-DUs.
gNB-DU1 experiences radio link outage and detects lost F1-U sequence numbers.

steps: Trigger radio link outage on gNB-DU1 and simulate lost F1-U sequence numbers.
gNB-DU1 sends DDDS PDU with 'Radio Link Outage' notification including highest transmitted, highest delivered, and lost NR PDCP sequence numbers to gNB-CU.
Verify that gNB-CU identifies lost PDCP PDUs based on sequence numbers and schedules retransmission via gNB-DU2.
Verify that gNB-CU switches data traffic to gNB-DU2 and retransmits undelivered PDCP PDUs.
expected_results: gNB-CU correctly interprets lost F1-U sequence numbers from gNB-DU1's notification.
gNB-CU retransmits all undelivered PDCP PDUs via gNB-DU2 without data loss.
UE receives retransmitted PDCP PDUs correctly via gNB-DU2.
Data traffic is switched seamlessly from gNB-DU1 to gNB-DU2.

title: Verify UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message from gNB-DU to gNB-CU and configuration type indication

Verify indication of full configuration if source cell group configuration is absent or gNB-DU decides full configuration

title: Verify handling of UE CONTEXT SETUP during Secondary Node Change with full and delta configuration

Verify that gNB-DU indicates delta configuration if partial update is applied
expected_results: UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message correctly includes or excludes source cell group configuration based on test scenario

title: MN Initiated SgNB Release Procedure in EN-DC
objective: Verify the correct execution of the MN initiated SgNB release procedure including message exchanges and UE context release between MeNB, gNB-CU, gNB-DU, and UE.
preconditions: EN-DC is active with UE connected to MeNB and SgNB (gNB-CU and gNB-DU).

steps: MeNB sends SGNB RELEASE REQUEST to gNB-CU.

UE responds with RRCConnectionReconfigurationComplete message to MeNB.
MeNB sends SN STATUS TRANSFER message to gNB-CU.
Data forwarding occurs from gNB-DU to MeNB as needed.
Path update procedure is performed.
MeNB sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE message to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND to gNB-DU.
gNB-DU responds with UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE to MeNB.
expected_results: gNB-DU stops UE data transmission scheduling upon receiving UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST.
All messages are exchanged in correct order without errors.
UE successfully reconfigures RRC connection as per RRCConnectionReconfiguration.
UE context is released properly at gNB-DU and gNB-CU.
Data forwarding and path update procedures complete successfully.
No residual data or context remains at SgNB after release.

title: Verify U2N Remote UE switch from direct to indirect path with gNB-DU change
objective: Ensure the correct signaling and context setup/release procedures occur when switching U2N Remote UE from direct to indirect path involving gNB-DU change.
preconditions: U2N Remote UE is in RRC_CONNECTED state with source gNB-DU and gNB-CU.
U2N Remote UE has established direct path with source gNB-DU.
Measurement configuration and reporting between U2N Remote UE and gNB-CU is functional.
Target gNB-DU and target U2N Relay UE are available.
steps: Perform Uu measurement configuration and reporting from U2N Remote UE to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU decides to switch U2N Remote UE to target U2N Relay UE under target gNB-DU.
If target U2N Relay UE is in RRC_CONNECTED, gNB-CU sends RRCReconfiguration to target U2N Relay UE; else skip this step.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST to target gNB-DU with path switch configuration.
Target gNB-DU responds with UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST including RRCReconfiguration message to source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU sends RRCReconfiguration message to U2N Remote UE.
U2N Remote UE stops UP and CP transmission over Uu upon receiving RRCReconfiguration.
Source gNB-DU sends UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION RESPONSE to gNB-CU.
U2N Remote UE establishes PC5 connection with target U2N Relay UE.
U2N Remote UE sends RRCReconfigurationComplete message to target gNB-DU via target U2N Relay UE.
Target gNB-DU sends UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER including RRCReconfigurationComplete to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND to source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context and sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE to gNB-CU.
expected_results: Measurement configuration and reporting is successfully completed.
gNB-CU correctly decides and initiates switch to target U2N Relay UE under target gNB-DU.
RRCReconfiguration message is sent to target U2N Relay UE if in RRC_CONNECTED state.
UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST and RESPONSE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and target gNB-DU.
UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST and RESPONSE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU.
U2N Remote UE receives RRCReconfiguration and stops UP and CP transmission over Uu.
PC5 connection between U2N Remote UE and target U2N Relay UE is established.
RRCReconfigurationComplete message is sent by U2N Remote UE and received by target gNB-DU and forwarded to gNB-CU.
UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND and COMPLETE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context successfully.
category: F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP - Path Switch

title: Verify behavior when target U2N Relay UE is in RRC_IDLE/INACTIVE state during direct to indirect path switch
objective: Validate that the procedure correctly handles the case when target U2N Relay UE is in RRC_IDLE/INACTIVE state during the path switch.

gNB-CU decides to switch U2N Remote UE to target U2N Relay UE under target gNB-DU.

U2N Remote UE sends RRCReconfigurationComplete message to target gNB-DU via target U2N Relay UE.

Target gNB-DU sends UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER including RRCReconfigurationComplete to gNB-CU.
gNB-CU sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND to source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context and sends UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMPLETE to gNB-CU.
expected_results: Measurement configuration and reporting is successfully completed.
gNB-CU correctly decides and initiates switch to target U2N Relay UE under target gNB-DU.
No RRCReconfiguration message is sent to target U2N Relay UE before path switch completion.
UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST and RESPONSE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and target gNB-DU.
UE CONTEXT MODIFICATION REQUEST and RESPONSE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU.
U2N Remote UE receives RRCReconfiguration and stops UP and CP transmission over Uu.
PC5 connection between U2N Remote UE and target U2N Relay UE is established.
RRCReconfigurationComplete message triggers RRC setup/resume procedure for target U2N Relay UE to enter RRC_CONNECTED state.
RRCReconfigurationComplete message is forwarded by target gNB-DU to gNB-CU.
UE CONTEXT RELEASE COMMAND and COMPLETE messages are exchanged successfully between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU.
Source gNB-DU releases UE context successfully.
category: F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP - Path Switch
